CustomField.formula: CASE(Status__c, "Archived", 2, /* Tier 1: AI Noise Reduction (Anti-Sales/Ghost) */ "AI Analyzed", 15, /* Tier 2: Technical Review Ready */ "Applied", 30, /* Tier 3: Technical Solution Proposal */ "Interviewing", 30, "Offer", 30, 0 /* Tier 0: Raw/New/Processing */ )
CustomField.label: Time Saved (Minutes)
